prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic cinematic portrait collage featuring the same person from the uploaded reference image as the only identity source, preserving 100% facial identity, hairstyle, beard, skin tone, and facial structure.
The composition consists of three seamlessly blended scenes:
Top Section: A large, dramatic close-up portrait of the subject looking slightly upward with a calm, thoughtful expression. He has short salt-and-pepper hair, light stubble, and wears black aviator sunglasses.
promptEn:
Create an ultra-realistic cinematic portrait collage featuring the same person from the uploaded reference image as the only identity source, preserving 100% facial identity, hairstyle, beard, skin tone, and facial structure.
The composition consists of three seamlessly blended scenes:
Top Section: A large, dramatic close-up portrait of the subject looking slightly upward with a calm, thoughtful expression. He has short salt-and-pepper hair, light stubble, and wears black aviator sunglasses.
promptZh:
创建一个超写实的电影感人像拼贴，以上传的参考图像中的同一个人作为唯一的身份来源，100% 保留面部特征、发型、胡须、肤色和面部结构。
构图由三个无缝融合的场景组成：
顶部区域：一张大型、富有戏剧性的特写人像，主体微微仰视，表情 冷静且深思。他留着灰白相间的短发，带有淡淡的胡茬，佩戴着 黑色飞行员太阳镜。
